seeker.headline: Is your resume actually reading?
seeker.subheadline: ATS systems reject 75% of resumes before a human sees them. Pathwise shows you exactly why—and how to fix it in seconds.

recruiter.headline: Filter the noise, find the signal.
recruiter.subheadline: Stop drowning in PDFs. Upload a batch of resumes and let AI rank them by relevance to your specific job description.

features.title: Why Pathwise?
features.subtitle: Built for clarity in a chaotic hiring market.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing.
pricing.subtitle: Start for free. Upgrade when you land the interview (or hire the candidate).

footer.tagline: Check your resume before the recruiter does.
